title: Sum Multiple Formula Columns

posts.author: afronzag (Alexia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
I saw a post on this from a few years ago, but wanted to see if there have been any changes.

I’m creating a portfolio management board and want to assess the overall health of the portfolio by using formula columns to weigh & score different status columns related to a given initiative (item). I have 10 or so formula columns doing this, and I’d like to sum the individual scores in an additional column. When I use the SUM formula in this summary column and put in the formula columns I want to sum, there is no return but the group summary row is able to average the outputs of those formulas.

TLDR: Are we still not able to use formula columns within a formula?

Thank you!
